data.title: 国际服主线Vol.3 第二章前篇更新
data.summary: [Update Preview] Sensei, the first half of Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Ch.2, Paradise Paradox will
data.body:
[Update Preview]

Sensei, the first half of Main Story Vol.3 Eden Treaty Ch.2, Paradise Paradox will be revealed on 5/17 (Tue).
Secret plots and lies threaten the Make-Up Work Club, as well as an unknown traitor.
